positive: A maximalist, symmetrical celestial constellation map that forms a mythical, glowing fox silhouette. The design should feature intricate filigree-style constellations connecting geometric celestial bodies (stars, moons, planets) rendered in vibrant sapphire blue, deep violet, and shimmering gold leaf accents. The background should be a rich, deep midnight blue gradient, creating high contrast against the glowing foreground silhouette. The style is Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Boho, suitable for a distressed textile print. Central composition, clean lines, high luminosity, cinematic studio lighting, extremely detailed, high contrast, perfect for t-shirt printing.
negative: blur, grainy, smudge, low resolution, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, distortion, solid color background, amateur, realistic photo
